title: Gun n craft
description: Turns minecraft into a shooting game
body:
**Gun n craft** is a gun based mosdpack that fully is revolved around guns

If you have not gotten a starting weapon use the following command:  
**/starterkit choose "desired gun"**

You will start off with a weapon of choice and is recomended to keep any pistol type because they stay even after death

Not only will you be equiped, but most of the mobs will also have the arrange of guns you could use

Instead of potions and brewing stand there are now wearable items and charms that give some of the old potion effects and new effects

Sleeping has been completley disabled and spawn points have been switched to be with campfires

**THE MODPACK IS VERY EARLY AND LACKS MANY FEATURES, UNWANTED MODS, AND HAS BUGS**
